title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, list models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers to talk with the Ollama server.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration for Ollama models (chat, embeddings) in Python and JS.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Open-source ChatGPT-style web UI for Ollama models; runs entirely in browser.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with synchronous, asynchronous and streaming APIs.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem to interact with Ollama’s REST API; chat, pull, list, delete models.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Enhanced CLI wrapper around Ollama with history, prompt templates and markdown output.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a local GitHub Copilot.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Official Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU/node selector support.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in pipelines.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-host Discord bot that answers questions using any Ollama model.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack bot that brings Ollama models into channels via socket-mode Bolt app.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module to run Ollama containers in CI pipelines for testing LLM-powered apps.

title: ollama-ex
summary: Elixir library wrapping Ollama REST API for chat, embeddings and model management.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix flake providing Ollama binary and module for declarative NixOS deployments.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate for Ollama with async/await and streaming support.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Official C# / .NET client for Ollama supporting chat, embeddings and model ops.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin to query local Ollama models for summarization and idea generation inside notes.

title: ollama-reddit discussion
summary: Reddit thread announcing Ollama v0.1.33 with built-in function-calling / tools support.
